title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Geodis India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Geodis India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!
